from html.parser import HTMLParser
import re

class GeminiParser\(HTMLParser\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.in_content = False
        self.current_tag = ''
        self.current_class = ''
        self.texts = []
        self.current_text = ''
        self.depth = 0
        
    def handle_starttag\(self, tag, attrs\):
        attrs_dict = dict\(attrs\)
        cls = attrs_dict.get\('class', ''\)
        if 'content-cell' in cls:
            self.in_content = True
            self.current_text = ''
        
    def handle_endtag\(self, tag\):
        if tag == 'div' and self.in_content:
            if self.current_text.strip\(\):
                self.texts.append\(self.current_text.strip\(\)\)
            self.in_content = False
            self.current_text = ''
    
    def handle_data\(self, data\):
        if self.in_content:
            self.current_text += data

parser = GeminiParser\(\)
with open\('MyActivity.html', 'r'\) as f:
    parser.feed\(f.read\(\)\)

# Print all content blocks
for i, t in enumerate\(parser.texts\):
    print\(f'=== BLOCK {i} ==='\)
    print\(t[:500]\)
    print\(\)
" 2>&1 | head -200)

from html.parser import HTMLParser

class GeminiParser\(HTMLParser\):
    def __init__\(self\):
        super\(\).__init__\(\)
        self.in_content = False
        self.texts = []
        self.current_text = ''
        
    def handle_starttag\(self, tag, attrs\):
        attrs_dict = dict\(attrs\)
        cls = attrs_dict.get\('class', ''\)
        if 'content-cell' in cls:
            self.in_content = True
            self.current_text = ''
        if tag == 'br' and self.in_content:
            self.current_text += '\\n'
        
    def handle_endtag\(self, tag\):
        if tag == 'div' and self.in_content:
            if self.current_text.strip\(\):
                self.texts.append\(self.current_text.strip\(\)\)
            self.in_content = False
            self.current_text = ''
    
    def handle_data\(self, data\):
        if self.in_content:
            self.current_text += data

parser = GeminiParser\(\)
with open\('MyActivity.html', 'r'\) as f:
    parser.feed\(f.read\(\)\)

# Filter out the 'Products: Gemini Apps' boilerplate blocks
research_blocks = [t for t in parser.texts if not t.startswith\('Products: Gemini'\)]

# Write each block to a separate file for easier reading
for i, block in enumerate\(research_blocks\):
    with open\(f'/tmp/gemini_data/block_{i}.txt', 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(block\)
    print\(f'Block {i}: {len\(block\)} chars | {block[:120]}...'\)

print\(f'\\nTotal research blocks: {len\(research_blocks\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

import json, os
from datetime import datetime

all_convos = []
for f in ['conversations-000.json', 'conversations-001.json']:
    with open\(f\) as fh:
        data = json.load\(fh\)
        all_convos.extend\(data\)

# Extract full text for investment conversations
invest_titles = [
    'Uber Investment Update', 'Kambi Business Update Analysis', 'ServiceNow CMDB and Workflows',
    'Coal Market Exposure Analysis', 'SEA LTD Stock Decline Analysis', 'Spotify Investment Update',
    'Lumentum Investment Analysis', 'Cloudflare Competitor Analysis', 'Deere Investment Evaluation',
    'Sandisk Investment Evaluation', 'Cameco Investment Analysis', 'Cheniere Energy Investment Analysis',
    'Occidental Petroleum Investment Analysis', 'Diamondback Energy Investment Analysis',
    'Iran War Macroeconomic Analysis', 'Commodity Market Analysis 2026',
    'Palantir vs Servicenow AI', 'Nvidia Omniverse and PhyX', 'TurboQuant Impact on Memory',
    'Costar Investment Evaluation', 'Betting on Inflation', 'Semiconductor Company Prospects',
    'Investment Outlook Photonics CPO', 'Buying Oil Call Options', 'AppLovin Business Model Overview',
    'John Deere Stock Rise', 'HIMS Investment Analysis', 'Kioxia Sandisk History Inquiry',
    'RBC Bearings Investment Insights', 'SanDisk Investment Analysis', 'Pure Storage Investment Thesis',
    'Nvidia CES Summary Request', 'Meta stock analysis', 'Edelweiss market share analysis',
    'ServiceNow Acquisition Strategy Analysis', 'Vail Resorts stock assessment',
    'Deere tech advantage comparison', 'Cloudflare product analysis', 'AI bubble risk assessment',
    'Duolingo story summary', 'Opendoor progress assessment', 'Equity research analysis',
    'Broadcom investment analysis', 'HBM4 breakthroughs and yields', 'GCC market shorting options',
    'Israel India Relations Analysis', 'Convexity in option pricing',
    'Stock options for US strike', 'Stock price decline analysis', 'Trump and Interest Rates',
    'Spotify Investment Update'
]

os.makedirs\('/tmp/chatgpt_data/convos', exist_ok=True\)

for c in all_convos:
    title = \(c.get\('title'\) or ''\).strip\(\)
    if title not in invest_titles:
        continue
    
    ts = c.get\('create_time'\)
    date_str = datetime.fromtimestamp\(ts\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\) if ts else 'unknown'
    
    # Extract messages in order
    mapping = c.get\('mapping', {}\)
    messages = []
    for node_id, node in mapping.items\(\):
        msg = node.get\('message'\)
        if not msg:
            continue
        role = msg.get\('author', {}\).get\('role', ''\)
        content = msg.get\('content', {}\)
        parts = content.get\('parts', []\)
        text_parts = [p for p in parts if isinstance\(p, str\) and p.strip\(\)]
        if text_parts and role in \('user', 'assistant'\):
            create_time = msg.get\('create_time', 0\) or 0
            messages.append\(\(create_time, role, '\\n'.join\(text_parts\)\)\)
    
    messages.sort\(key=lambda x: x[0]\)
    
    # Write to file
    safe_title = title.replace\('/', '-'\).replace\(' ', '_'\)
    filename = f'/tmp/chatgpt_data/convos/{date_str}_{safe_title}.txt'
    with open\(filename, 'w'\) as f:
        f.write\(f'# {title}\\n# Date: {date_str}\\n# Messages: {len\(messages\)}\\n\\n'\)
        for ts, role, text in messages:
            f.write\(f'[{role.upper\(\)}]\\n{text[:8000]}\\n\\n'\)  # Cap individual messages
    
    size = os.path.getsize\(filename\)
    print\(f'{date_str} | {len\(messages\):3d} msgs | {size:8d} bytes | {title}'\)

" 2>&1 | sort -r)

from html.parser import HTMLParser
import re

with open\('/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/gemini/Takeout/My Activity/Gemini Apps/MyActivity.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find Canvas titles - these are the deep research outputs
canvases = re.findall\(r'Created Gemini Canvas titled \(.*?\)\(?:<|#\)', content\)
clean = lambda x: re.sub\(r'&[^;]+;', ' ', x\).strip\(\)

print\('=== GEMINI DEEP RESEARCH CANVASES ==='\)
for i, c in enumerate\(canvases\):
    print\(f'{i+1}. {clean\(c\)}'\)

# Find all prompts
prompts = re.findall\(r'Prompted \(.*?\)\(?:\(?:Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec\) \\d\)', content, re.DOTALL\)
print\(f'\\n=== GEMINI PROMPTS \(investment-related\) ==='\)
investment_keywords = ['invest', 'stock', 'valuat', 'thesis', 'market', 'trade', 'hedge', 'commod', 'analysis', 'evaluat', 'compet', 'revenue', 'growth', 'capital', 'portfolio', 'sector', 'bull', 'bear', 'moat', 'disrupt']
for p in prompts:
    cleaned = clean\(re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', p\)\).strip\(\)
    if any\(kw in cleaned.lower\(\) for kw in investment_keywords\) and len\(cleaned\) > 20:
        print\(f'- {cleaned[:200]}'\)

import re

with open\('/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/gemini/Takeout/My Activity/Gemini Apps/MyActivity.html', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Extract canvas titles from 'Created Gemini Canvas titled' patterns
canvases = re.findall\(r'Created Gemini Canvas titled \([^<#]+\)', content\)
print\('=== GEMINI CANVASES ==='\)
for c in canvases:
    title = re.sub\(r'&[^;]+;', \\"'\\", c\).strip\(\)
    print\(f'  - {title}'\)

print\(f'\\nTotal canvases: {len\(canvases\)}'\)

# Extract prompts - they follow 'Prompted ' until a date pattern
prompts = re.findall\(r'Prompted\\s+\(.*?\)\(?:Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec\)\\s+\\d', content, re.DOTALL\)
print\(f'\\n=== ALL GEMINI PROMPTS \({len\(prompts\)} total\) ==='\)
for i, p in enumerate\(prompts\):
    cleaned = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', p\).strip\(\)[:200]
    if len\(cleaned\) > 15:
        print\(f'{i+1}. {cleaned}'\)
" 2>&1)

import json, os, re

output_dir = '/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/extracted'
os.makedirs\(output_dir, exist_ok=True\)

# Target conversations to extract
targets = {
    # Category 1: New tickers
    'Diamondback Energy Investment Analysis': 'FANG',
    'Occidental Petroleum Investment Analysis': 'OXY',
    'SEA LTD Stock Decline Analysis': 'SE',
    'GCC market shorting options': 'MACRO-GCC',
    'Commodity Market Analysis 2026': 'MACRO-COMMODITIES',
    'Agricultural Industrial Cycle': 'MACRO-AG',
    'Betting on Inflation': 'MACRO-INFLATION',
    'CETY NASDAQ Company Report': 'CETY',
    'V MA Stablecoin Competition': 'V-MA-STABLECOIN',
    'Sprott Inc. overview': 'SPROTT',
    'US insurance broking market': 'INSURANCE',
    'Israel India Relations Analysis': 'MACRO-GEOPOLITICS',
    # Category 2: Supplementary
    'Cargowise impact analysis': 'WTC-CARGOWISE',
    'Edelweiss market share analysis': 'EDEL',
    'HBM4 breakthroughs and yields': 'HBM4',
    'Nvidia CES Summary Request': 'NVDA-CES',
    'EML Laser Manufacturing Breakdown': 'LITE-EML',
    'Silicon photonics supply chain': 'LITE-PHOTONICS-SC',
    'Coal Market Exposure Analysis': 'MACRO-COAL',
    'Silver Demand and Data Centers': 'SILVER-DC',
    'Liquid Cooling Feasibility': 'LIQUID-COOLING',
    'Ethereum Solana Tokenization Updates': 'CRYPTO-TOKENIZATION',
    'Ethereum vs other L1s': 'CRYPTO-L1',
    'Opendoor progress assessment': 'OPEN',
}

def extract_assistant_text\(mapping\):
    """Extract all assistant messages from a ChatGPT conversation mapping"""
    if not mapping:
        return ""
    texts = []
    # Sort by create_time
    nodes = sorted\(mapping.values\(\), key=lambda x: x.get\('message', {}\).get\('create_time', 0\) if x.get\('message'\) else 0\)
    for node in nodes:
        msg = node.get\('message'\)
        if not msg:
            continue
        role = msg.get\('author', {}\).get\('role', ''\)
        if role == 'assistant':
            content = msg.get\('content', {}\)
            parts = content.get\('parts', []\)
            for part in parts:
                if isinstance\(part, str\) and len\(part\) > 20:
                    texts.append\(part\)
    return '\\n\\n'.join\(texts\)

# Process ChatGPT files
for fname in ['conversations-000.json', 'conversations-001.json']:
    fpath = f'/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/chatgpt/{fname}'
    with open\(fpath\) as f:
        convos = json.load\(f\)
    for c in convos:
        title = c.get\('title', ''\)
        if title in targets:
            ticker = targets[title]
            text = extract_assistant_text\(c.get\('mapping', {}\)\)
            if text:
                outfile = f'{output_dir}/chatgpt_{ticker}.md'
                with open\(outfile, 'w'\) as out:
                    from datetime import datetime
                    dt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(c.get\('create_time', 0\)\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\)
                    out.write\(f'# {title}\\n\\nSource: ChatGPT | Date: {dt}\\n\\n{text}'\)
                print\(f'✅ Extracted: {title} → {outfile} \({len\(text\)} chars\)'\)
            else:
                print\(f'⚠️ Empty: {title}'\)

print\('\\nChatGPT extraction complete.'\)
PYEOF)

import json, os, re
from datetime import datetime

output_dir = '/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/extracted'
os.makedirs\(output_dir, exist_ok=True\)

targets = {
    'Diamondback Energy Investment Analysis': 'FANG',
    'Occidental Petroleum Investment Analysis': 'OXY',
    'SEA LTD Stock Decline Analysis': 'SE',
    'GCC market shorting options': 'MACRO-GCC',
    'Commodity Market Analysis 2026': 'MACRO-COMMODITIES',
    'Agricultural Industrial Cycle': 'MACRO-AG',
    'Betting on Inflation': 'MACRO-INFLATION',
    'CETY NASDAQ Company Report': 'CETY',
    'V MA Stablecoin Competition': 'V-MA-STABLECOIN',
    'Sprott Inc. overview': 'SPROTT',
    'US insurance broking market': 'INSURANCE',
    'Israel India Relations Analysis': 'MACRO-GEOPOLITICS',
    'Cargowise impact analysis': 'WTC-CARGOWISE',
    'Edelweiss market share analysis': 'EDEL',
    'HBM4 breakthroughs and yields': 'HBM4',
    'Nvidia CES Summary Request': 'NVDA-CES',
    'EML Laser Manufacturing Breakdown': 'LITE-EML',
    'Silicon photonics supply chain': 'LITE-PHOTONICS-SC',
    'Coal Market Exposure Analysis': 'MACRO-COAL',
    'Silver Demand and Data Centers': 'SILVER-DC',
    'Liquid Cooling Feasibility': 'LIQUID-COOLING',
    'Ethereum Solana Tokenization Updates': 'CRYPTO-TOKENIZATION',
    'Ethereum vs other L1s': 'CRYPTO-L1',
    'Opendoor progress assessment': 'OPEN',
}

def extract_assistant_text\(mapping\):
    if not mapping:
        return ""
    texts = []
    def get_time\(node\):
        msg = node.get\('message'\)
        if msg and msg.get\('create_time'\):
            return msg['create_time']
        return 0
    nodes = sorted\(mapping.values\(\), key=get_time\)
    for node in nodes:
        msg = node.get\('message'\)
        if not msg:
            continue
        role = msg.get\('author', {}\).get\('role', ''\)
        if role == 'assistant':
            content = msg.get\('content', {}\)
            if isinstance\(content, dict\):
                parts = content.get\('parts', []\)
                for part in parts:
                    if isinstance\(part, str\) and len\(part\) > 20:
                        texts.append\(part\)
    return '\\n\\n---\\n\\n'.join\(texts\)

for fname in ['conversations-000.json', 'conversations-001.json']:
    fpath = f'/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/chatgpt/{fname}'
    with open\(fpath\) as f:
        convos = json.load\(f\)
    for c in convos:
        title = c.get\('title', ''\)
        if title in targets:
            ticker = targets[title]
            text = extract_assistant_text\(c.get\('mapping', {}\)\)
            if text and len\(text\) > 100:
                outfile = f'{output_dir}/chatgpt_{ticker}.md'
                ct = c.get\('create_time', 0\)
                dt = datetime.fromtimestamp\(ct\).strftime\('%Y-%m-%d'\) if ct else 'unknown'
                with open\(outfile, 'w'\) as out:
                    out.write\(f'# {title}\\n\\nSource: ChatGPT | Date: {dt}\\n\\n{text}'\)
                print\(f'✅ {ticker}: {title} \({len\(text\):,} chars\)'\)
            else:
                print\(f'⚠️  Empty/short: {title}'\)

print\('\\nDone with ChatGPT.'\)
PYEOF)

import json, os
from datetime import datetime

output_dir = '/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/extracted'

# Claude targets - conversations with research not yet in vault
claude_targets = {
    'E Ink Holdings competitive analysis and valuation': 'EINK',

    'Reliance Industries investment update and Jio valuation': 'RELIANCE',
    'Uber investment analysis and market dynamics': 'UBER-UPDATE',
}

with open\('/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/claude/conversations.json'\) as f:
    convos = json.load\(f\)

print\(f'Total Claude conversations: {len\(convos\)}'\)

for c in convos:
    name = c.get\('name', ''\)
    for target_name, ticker in claude_targets.items\(\):
        if target_name.lower\(\) in name.lower\(\):
            # Extract assistant messages
            texts = []
            for msg in c.get\('chat_messages', []\):
                if msg.get\('sender'\) == 'assistant':
                    for content in msg.get\('content', []\):
                        if content.get\('type'\) == 'text' and len\(content.get\('text', ''\)\) > 50:
                            texts.append\(content['text']\)
            
            if texts:
                text = '\\n\\n---\\n\\n'.join\(texts\)
                dt = c.get\('created_at', ''\)[:10]
                outfile = f'{output_dir}/claude_{ticker}.md'
                with open\(outfile, 'w'\) as out:
                    out.write\(f'# {name}\\n\\nSource: Claude | Date: {dt}\\n\\n{text}'\)
                print\(f'✅ {ticker}: {name} \({len\(text\):,} chars\)'\)
            break

print\('\\nDone with Claude.'\)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re, os

output_dir = '/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/extracted'

with open\('/Users/alexcohen/InvestmentVault/Research/raw/_staging/gemini/Takeout/My Activity/Gemini Apps/MyActivity.html', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Gemini targets - specific prompts and their canvas outputs we need
gemini_targets = {
    'Intuitive Surgical': 'ISRG',
    'Duolingo': 'DUOL',
    'self driving': 'UBER-SELFDRIVING',
    'Circle Internet': 'CRCL',
    'CRCL and COIN': 'CRCL-COIN',
    'DRAM and HBM': 'HBM-COMPETITIVE',
    'memory upcycle': 'MEMORY-CYCLE',
    'Base network': 'CRYPTO-BASE',
    'AI regulatory frameworks': 'CRYPTO-REGULATION',
    'Bali': 'MACRO-BALI',
    'BESI': 'BESI-HBM',
}

# Extract content blocks between div boundaries
# Gemini HTML has content-cell divs with the actual responses
blocks = re.split\(r'<div class="outer-cell', content\)

found = {}
for block in blocks:
    for keyword, ticker in gemini_targets.items\(\):
        if keyword.lower\(\) in block.lower\(\) and ticker not in found:
            # Clean HTML
            text = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', block\)
            text = re.sub\(r'&[a-z]+;', ' ', text\)
            text = re.sub\(r'\\s+', ' ', text\).strip\(\)
            if len\(text\) > 200:
                outfile = f'{output_dir}/gemini_{ticker}.md'
                with open\(outfile, 'w'\) as out:
                    out.write\(f'# Gemini Research: {keyword}\\n\\nSource: Gemini | Extracted from activity log\\n\\n{text[:50000]}'\)
                found[ticker] = len\(text\)
                print\(f'✅ {ticker}: {keyword} \({len\(text\):,} chars\)'\)

# Also check the PDF
print\(f'\\nAlso found PDF: 90d133fe...pdf \(likely Circle/CRCL S-1 filing\)'\)
print\('\\nDone with Gemini.'\)
PYEOF)

# DE and LITE are missing sector, check what sector MOCs they appear in

# Check for theses missing from their declared sector MOC
echo ""
echo "=== Checking all theses against their declared sector MOC ==="
for f in Theses/*.md; do
  sector=$\(grep "^sector:" "$f" | sed 's/sector: *//'\)
  bn=$\(basename "$f" .md\)
  if [ -n "$sector" ]; then
    # Map sector to MOC file
    if [ -f "Sectors/$sector.md" ]; then
      if ! grep -qF "$bn" "Sectors/$sector.md"; then
        echo "MISSING FROM MOC: $bn \(sector: $sector\)"
      fi
    else
      echo "SECTOR MOC NOT FOUND: $bn declares sector '$sector' but Sectors/$sector.md doesn't exist"
    fi
  fi
done)

Bash(# Check for empty sections in thesis notes
for f in Theses/*.md; do
  bn=$\(basename "$f" .md\)
  
  # Check for Summary section content  
  summary_empty=""
  if ! grep -qA2 "^## Summary" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
    # Some use "Original Questions" instead of Summary
    if ! grep -q "^## Original Questions" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
      summary_empty="YES"
    fi
  fi
  
  # Check Key Metrics has actual content \(table or numbers\)
  km_line=$\(grep -n "^## Key Metrics" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d: -f1\)
  if [ -n "$km_line" ]; then
    # Check next 10 lines for table content
    km_content=$\(sed -n "$\(\(km_line+1\)\),$\(\(km_line+10\)\)p" "$f" | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "^#" | head -5\)
    if [ -z "$km_content" ]; then
      echo "EMPTY KEY METRICS: $bn"
    fi
  fi
  
  # Check Bull/Bear Case
  bc_line=$\(grep -n "^## Bull Case" "$f" 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d: -f1\)
  if [ -n "$bc_line" ]; then
    bc_content=$\(sed -n "$\(\(bc_line+1\)\),$\(\(bc_line+10\)\)p" "$f" | grep -v "^$" | grep -v "^#" | head -5\)
    if [ -z "$bc_content" ]; then
      echo "EMPTY BULL CASE: $bn"
    fi
  fi
  
done)
